{{Infobox artifact
| name = Spirit Manifestation pill
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Spirit Manifestation pill]] is a rare and expensive elixir refined from valuable herbs and blood essences.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Spirit Manifestation pill]] is customized to the individual consuming it.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Spirit Manifestation pill]] can fill a user with enough [[sword madra]] to break the boundary to [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
